gemini-nb2-batch.quirks: JPEG out; sync uses ?key= query param, batch uses x-goog-api-key header; aspect via generationConfig.imageConfig.aspectRatio; inline-request batch; 50% cost vs sync

gpt-image-2-atlas.quirks: Atlas Cloud standard route, distinct from the openai-direct gpt-image-2 stub. Async: POST generateImage returns a polling handle, then GET prediction/{id} until status=completed, image delivered as a URL in outputs[0] (PNG) which the adapter downloads. quality low|medium|high (flat-priced, ~$0.008/image). No true 16:9; landscape maxes at 1536x1024 (3:2), which assemble.py crop-fills to 1920x1080. Bearer auth. supports_batch false, so the Gemini batch path never reaches it; use the sync per-scene path.

gpt-image-2.quirks: STUB, not wired. Synchronous only, no batch API; size expressed as WxH (e.g. 1792x1024) not an aspect ratio; response is data[].b64_json (PNG)
